name: Paygent Connect
description: Paygent provides payment gateway and payment infrastructure services for online and in-person transactions; 'Paygent Connect' appears to be a merchant/integration offering for connecting to Paygent's platform (public developer docs not found).

auth_methods.note: No public developer or API documentation pages found on the official site that describe supported auth methods. Homepage is marketing-only and does not document API auth.

credential_access.note: Partner page emphasizes contacting Paygent and joining a partner program; site lacks publicly accessible signup or developer portal describing self-serve credential issuance.

api_surface.note: Product pages list features and integrations but no public REST/GraphQL API docs or SDK links were found; suggests API documentation is not publicly published.

buildability.note: Public developer documentation and self-serve API credential issuance are not available on the official site; integration likely requires contacting Paygent or becoming a partner.

queries: Paygent API ドキュメント
